[Comment]: Hi Janis, I live and work in Four Seasons; I have over 100 customers within our community. I can pressure wash whatever you need on your home or property. However, if it is only the typical cobwebs that we all have over time, I have a service I offer that I use my extension pole and a cobweb cleaner brush. It takes away all the cobwebs and light dirt. It really makes the home look refreshed without the expense of power washing, plus I blow off the concrete around the home to give it an additional clean look and feel. I would do the entire house and it would cost $55.00. My Primary business is Professional Window cleaning and Gutter Cleaning. I could also offer a multiple service discount if you have any interest in the either service. Call or text me if I can be of assistance. Dan Saunders Window & Solar Care 855-245-2273
